message:
style(cli,dir): split debug println onto separate line and reformat remove_entry log statements

ffs-cli: Splits the accidentally joined debug println in parse_first_json_line
test helper onto its own line (was: `buffer.as_string(); println!(...)` on
one line, now properly separated).

ffs-dir: Reformats two debug println! calls in remove_entry to multi-line
format!() for readability — no logic changes, purely rustfmt compliance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
